user.title: Alexa Device Builder
user.description:
Configure where the Alexa filter package file will be written. The path is relative to your Home Assistant config directory.

Make sure your `configuration.yaml` includes the packages directory:
```yaml
homeassistant:
  packages: !include_dir_named packages
```

data_description.package_path: Relative path within the config directory where the Alexa package YAML file will be written (e.g. packages/alexa_devices.yaml)

filter.title: Alexa Device Filter
filter.description:
Select the entities and domains to expose to Alexa. Include rules take precedence over exclude rules.

Leave all lists empty to expose all entities.

data_description.locale: Locale used by Alexa for this smart home (e.g. de-DE, en-US). Leave empty to use the Alexa app default.
data_description.include_entities: Only these specific entities will be exposed to Alexa
data_description.include_domains: All entities in these domains will be exposed to Alexa
data_description.exclude_entities: These specific entities will not be exposed to Alexa
data_description.exclude_domains: All entities in these domains will not be exposed to Alexa

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Alexa Device Builder can be configured.
